security.csp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*

bundle.longDescription: Case Maker is a parametric 3D-printable enclosure designer for microcontrollers and single-board computers. Visualize boards, place mounting points, and generate production-ready STL/3MF files for slicers.
